checks.description: Oracle 12c must enable audit_trail to DB, XML, or OS
Oracle 12c must have unified auditing enabled
Oracle 12c REMOTE_LOGIN_PASSWORDFILE must be set to EXCLUSIVE
Oracle 12c user tablespaces must be encrypted
Oracle 12c must enforce case-sensitive passwords
Oracle 12c must not have FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c must not have PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c must not have PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c must not have PASSWORD_REUSE_MAX set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c must not have PASSWORD_REUSE_TIME set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c PASSWORD_GRACE_TIME must be 7 days or less
Oracle 12c must have PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION defined for all profiles
Oracle 12c must not have IDLE_TIME set to UNLIMITED
Oracle 12c REMOTE_OS_AUTHENT must be set to FALSE
Oracle 12c REMOTE_OS_ROLES must be set to FALSE
Oracle 12c SQL92_SECURITY must be set to TRUE
Oracle 12c must require network encryption (SQLNET.ENCRYPTION_SERVER=REQUIRED)
Oracle 12c must require crypto checksums (SQLNET.CRYPTO_CHECKSUM_SERVER=REQUIRED)
Oracle 12c must use AES256 for network encryption algorithm
Oracle 12c listener must have ADMIN_RESTRICTIONS enabled
